_note: Captured on Linux CI via run-benchmark-snapshot label trigger (build 24593040868). Phase 3 import-time deferrals dropped lfx_bare from 17824.74ms to 10619.55ms (-40%) vs the Phase 1 baseline. langflow_run_http_ready remains sentinel: the structlog processor pipeline swallows uvicorn's 'Application startup complete.' marker, so the supervisor times out. langflow_run_no_change_restart is the Phase 4 SVC-01 D-03 scenario; the supervisor runs two full langflow boots per hyperfine iteration and cannot fit the 5-15 min CI budget with runs=5, so it stays sentinel until the supervisor is refactored (follow-up). measurement_mode is bytecode_compile_delta per D-11a.
